Saṅkhārakkhandhakathā/X/X/458.text: Abhi 1. 17; Abhiṭṭha 1. 178 piṭṭhesu passitabbaṁ. 2-3. Abhi-Ṭṭha 1. 176 piṭṭhe.

Saṅkhārakkhandhakathā/X/X/505.text: Pañca ca bhikkhave (I), pañca bhikkhave (Saṁ 2. 39 Pāḷi)

Saṅkhārakkhandhakathā/X/X/527.text: Dukkhasamudayaṁ (Sī, I, Ka), Visuddhimaggaṭīkāyaṁ hi upari ādīnavānupassanāñāṇavaṇṇanāyaṁ “Satipi dvinnaṁ padānaṁ samānādhikaraṇabhāve liṅgabhedo gahito, yathā dukkhasamudayo ariyasaccan”ti vuttaṁ. Taṁ “dukkhanirodhagāminī paṭipadā ariyasaccan”ti vacanena ca sameti.

Saṅkhārakkhandhakathā/X/X/529.text: Dukkhasamudayaṁ (Sī, I, Ka), Visuddhimaggaṭīkāyaṁ hi upari ādīnavānupassanāñāṇavaṇṇanāyaṁ “Satipi dvinnaṁ padānaṁ samānādhikaraṇabhāve liṅgabhedo gahito, yathā dukkhasamudayo ariyasaccan”ti vuttaṁ. Taṁ “dukkhanirodhagāminī paṭipadā ariyasaccan”ti vacanena ca sameti.

Saṅkhārakkhandhakathā/X/X/633.text: Tāni bījāni abhisaṅkhārā vā (Sī, I), tāni bījāni abhisaṅkhārā (Ka)

Saṅkhārakkhandhakathā/X/X/642.text: Dhammārammaṇañca (sabbattha) Sammohavinodaniyā, Ṭīkāhi ca saṁsandetabbā, āyatanānaṁ adhikāratā ca manasikātabbā.

Saṅkhārakkhandhakathā/X/X/646.text: Khu 1. 42 Dhammapade. 4-4. Abhi 2. 143 Pāḷiyaṁ na dissati.

Saṅkhārakkhandhakathā/X/Sambahulasuttant.text: Addhānaṁ ārabbha ajjhattaṁ (Syā), addhānaṁ ārabbha (Sī, Ka)
Yaṁ hi aniccaṁ taṁ dukkhaṁ (Sī, Syā, I), yañhi aniccaṁ, taṁ dukkhaṁ, taṁ (Ka)
“Ettha ca uppādo viseso, bhayaṁ visesitabbaṁ sāmaññabhāvatoti satipi dvinnaṁ padānaṁ samānādhikaraṇabhāve liṅgabhedo gahito, yathā dukkhasamudayo ariyasaccanti” (Ṭīkā)
Kāmañca pana (sabbattha); Paṭisambhidāmaggaṭṭhakathāya; Visuddhimaggaṭīkāya ca saṁsandetabbaṁ.
Kāmañca pana (sabbattha); Paṭisambhidāmaggaṭṭhakathāya; Visuddhimaggaṭīkāya ca saṁsandetabbaṁ.
Kvaci passatīti (I, Ka) 2-2. Idaṁ vākyaṁ Sī-I-Ka-potthakesu na dissati, Ma-Ṭṭha 3. 43 piṭṭhe passitabbaṁ.
Cūḷani 184 piṭṭhe. Pacchimā pana cha ākārā aññathā dissanti.
Na yi maṁ kokaṁ punarāgantā (Sī), na imaṁ lokaṁ puna āgantā (Syā), imaṁ lokaṁ puna anāgantvā (Ka)
Cassa (Syā, Ka) 3-3. Taṁ ekattaṁ ekena ñāṇena (Sī, I)
